title: stelis cruenta
intro: Stelis cruenta, also known as the bleeding orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and alleviating pain, which is attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The herbal preparations of Stelis cruenta typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used in teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
